guardrails: W1.5.216 executes only the W1.5.214 runtime UX final acceptance blocker repair track for FR-007, FR-008, FR-011, FR-013, FR-014, FR-017, and FR-018.

W1.5.216 does not execute stream final acceptance repairs, A8 Git-history conformance repairs, runtime/Desktop production behavior, accepted spec changes, ADR changes, schema changes, generated schema changes, dependency changes, packaging, updater work, or baseline docx changes.
No repair field may mark any FR accepted, ready, completed, implemented, or phase-exit satisfied.

Runtime UX repair evidence remains metadata-only and must not include raw prompts, raw model output, uploaded-file bytes, instruction text, response bodies, artifact bodies, reference bytes, HITL prompt text, custom decision values, secure paths, cache paths, output directory values, full destination paths, credentials, or user staged file content.

accepted_items and implemented_items remain zero; EXIT-P1-1 and EXIT-P1-10 remain not_ready.
